# Citation Modes Reference

This document exercises citation modes using `tests/fixtures/bib/sample.bib` (or `sample.json`).

## Parenthetical citations
- Single: [@knuth1984]
- Multiple: [@knuth1984; @lamport1994]
- With prefix/suffix: [see @knuth1984, p. 42]

## Narrative citations
- Single: @knuth1984 says TeX is a typesetting system.
- Multiple: @knuth1984 and @lamport1994 discuss document preparation.

## Year-only / suppress author
- Year-only: [@knuth1984, 1984]
- Suppress author: [@knuth1984, 1984]

## Mixed types
- Conference: [@miller2023]
- Thesis: [@garcia2022]
- Report: [@lee2021]
- Web: [@webaccess2024]
